summary: Comprehensive testing of Iteration 170 features: Mantras API (31 entries), Game Avatar system (10 avatars: 4 free, 3 earned, 3 premium), Tiered Dust Sales (0/15/30% discounts), 30% Return Penalty, Atmosphere Switch (Simplified/Standard/Ultra-Immersive). Backend: 30/30 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified working.
seed_data_creation: User has 51 credits, 100 dust, 100 gems. Active avatar: The Guardian (mood: dormant, resonance: 0/100)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 170 features fully working. Key endpoints tested: GET /api/mantras (3 random), GET /api/mantras?category=trade (filtered), GET /api/mantras/all (31 total), GET /api/avatar/catalog (10 avatars), GET /api/avatar/profile (mood/resonance), POST /api/avatar/select, POST /api/avatar/purchase, GET /api/trade-circle/ai-merchant (tiered dust), POST /api/trade-circle/ai-merchant/sell (30% fee). Frontend verified: Trade Circle 7 tabs (Browse, Broker, Escrow, Avatar, My Listings, Offers, Karma), MantraBanner in Dashboard/TradeCircle/Mixer, Avatar tab with Free/Earned/Premium tiers, Sell Back panel with 30% Processing Fee breakdown, Merchant Goods with 15%/30% OFF badges, Atmosphere Switch in nav and Settings page with Simplified/Standard/Ultra-Immersive labels.

mantras_api.GET /api/mantras/all: Returns full library (31 mantras) with categories

avatar_system.GET /api/avatar/catalog: Returns 10 avatars (4 free, 3 earned, 3 premium) with unlock status
avatar_system.GET /api/avatar/profile: Returns active avatar with mood (dormant/awakening/flowing/radiant/transcendent) and resonance level (0-100)
avatar_system.POST /api/avatar/select: Selects free avatar from unlocked collection
avatar_system.POST /api/avatar/purchase: Purchases premium avatar with credits (Phoenix 25cr, Oracle 35cr, Sovereign 50cr)

atmosphere_switch.nav_panel: Dropdown with 3 options and device recommendations
atmosphere_switch.settings_section: Atmosphere Switch section with 3 buttons and accessibility note

mantra_banner.trade_circle: MantraBanner in header with trade-category mantras
mantra_banner.mixer: MantraBanner in header with mixer-category mantras
